# Claude Code hooks

In-loop enforcement for Claude Code. `dox-context.sh` (PreToolUse) injects the AGENTS.md chain for the edited path; `dox-gate.sh` (Stop) auto-syncs the index and blocks finishing on hard drift. Wire both via `settings.snippet.json`.

## Contract
- Hooks must stay side-effect-free except for `dox sync` (deterministic, safe to auto-apply).
- Never block on prose-drift here - that is a warning only. Block only on MISSING / DANGLING.

### Map
